description_long: This hamburger features a soft, golden-brown plain bun encasing a thick beef patty, a slice of melted cheddar cheese, and visible strips of cooked bacon. The cheese is slightly melted and drapes over the patty, while the bacon peeks out from the sides, adding texture and color contrast. The bottom bun appears slightly compressed, likely from the weight of the fillings. The hamburger is served on a crumpled piece of white wax paper with faint printed text, suggesting a casual, takeout presentation. There are no visible vegetables such as lettuce or tomato, and the bun surface is smooth without sesame seeds. The overall appearance is appetizing, with a focus on the classic combination of beef, cheese, and bacon.
description: A classic hamburger with a plain golden-brown bun, beef patty, melted cheddar cheese, and bacon, served on wax paper. The bun is smooth and the fillings are generously portioned.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the bacon and cheese protruding from the side, with the top bun slightly domed and smooth.
description_view_1: This angle shows more of the beef patty and the bottom bun, with less bacon visible and the cheese peeking out.
description_view_2: The patty and cheese are visible beneath the bun, with a clear view of the smooth, golden top bun and some bacon at the edge.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the bacon strips and cheese spilling out, with the bun slightly compressed and the wax paper more crumpled.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Cheese is layered directly on top of the beef patty, with bacon strips placed above or beside the cheese, all enclosed by the top and bottom buns. The toppings are unevenly distributed, with bacon and cheese protruding from the sides.
